title: Warm up
content: Images of drivers in three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, are displayed. Each image focuses on a different aspect of modern life.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide highlights that China is undergoing change, focusing on its cities. It aims to provide a visual tour illustrating vibrant city life.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This session involves investigating and researching city characteristics. The process involves assessing local features, development strategies, and the resulting positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide presents development strategies for Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city is matched with a strategy reflecting its growth objectives.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide discusses development strategies for cities through images representing urban life. It emphasizes customized strategies based on local traits.
